Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, low total CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment with metabolic acidosis. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal dysfunction and possible dehydration or catabolic state. HbA1c is low, indicating no chronic hyperglycemia. Recommend clinical correlation for acute or chronic kidney disease and further nephrological evaluation.
